text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been some time since I became Air Shakur's trainer. We haven't
had any glaring issues, but I do have one concern.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Talk, huh... What about?
choice_data_list:
Um... Would you like to get food together after
training?

Um... Would you like to get food together after
training?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The two of us haven't gotten any closer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even on a good day, Air Shakur's attitude towards me is prickly at
best. But I want to do everything I can to support her in the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And for me to do that, she needs to trust me. Obviously it won't
happen all at once, but surely I can build up that trust little by little.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After asking around, I managed to come up with a few ideas to help
us get closer. All that's left is to bring them up to Air Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh? An outdoor festival? No way.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What? You made your own PC? You? Huh... And?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's becoming clear that Air Shakur doesn't want to interact with me
outside training-related business.
choice_data_list: But I won't give up yet!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
So now you want to spend the day together, huh? What's gotten into
you recently?
choice_data_list: I just want us to get to know each other better.
I just want us to get to know each other better.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Not necessary. We only formed a contract because I needed a trainer
for my debut.
choice_data_list: But I'll let you pick the place!
But I'll let you pick the place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We don't even have to talk. All I can hope is that this time together
will help her trust me just a little more. Once I explain my intentions
to her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We don't even have to talk. All I can hope is that this time together
will help her trust me just a little more. Once I explain my intentions
to her...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: All right, fine. Guess I'll just waste a day with this then... You said I could pick the place, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I meet up with Air Shakur the next day. She then takes me
to...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One with only single booths at that. Our booths aren't even next to
each other... But I did promise she could pick, and I won't go back on
my word.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I also don't know when our next outing will be, if ever... So I have
to make this work!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What now? This better be good, or I'm kicking you out.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...No, I'm not hungry, nor do I think I will be.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
choice_data_list: C-can I at least get you something to drink?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Would you SHUT UP?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
All right, if you really wanna be friends or whatever, give me. Some
damn. SPACE!

text_block_list.name: Cafe Staff A
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, miss, could we speak for a moment?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
WHAT NOW?!
...Ah.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Tch. Guess I can't go back there.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Lots of trainers have business-like arrangements with their trainees.
And it's not like their race results suffer from that lack of a personal
relationship.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you're aware of that fact too. So I can think of only one
reason you'd keep up this stupidity.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You must believe that us being all buddy-buddy would be good for
me. Seeing the loner avoid making friends makes you sad, right?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Should've known better. Nothing changes.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: The only partner I need is my PC. So quit inviting me out. Got it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur doesn't see the need to build relationships with people. I
understand that. After all, she made it this far on her own, with only
her numbers to guide her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What will happen when she encounters a problem she can't solve on her own? I want to prepare for that possibility.
choice_data_list: I won't give up that easy.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...I don't get it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
As always, you make no sense. Wouldn't it be easier to just do as I
say?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Do whatever you want.
